description: Initiate a 'Serial Document Review' workflow for the 'Project Proposal' document in the 'Projects' workspace. Assign 'jsmith' (John Smith) as the reviewer and include the comment: 'Please review the budget estimates and timeline in sections 3 and 4. Approve if accurate or reject with comments.'

metadata.expected_directive: Please review the budget estimates and timeline in sections 3 and 4. Approve if accurate or reject with comments.
